nodes.title: Get Pending Accounts
nodes.description: GET /api/businesses/:bizId/pending-accounts. Returns array of pending accounts for business. Returns 200 with [{id, personOrEntity, description, status, ...}].

nodes.title: Get Settlements List
nodes.description: GET /api/businesses/:bizId/settlements. Returns array of reconciliations for business ordered by createdAt desc. Returns 200 with [{id, reconciliationType, expectedAmount, actualAmount, ...}].
